name: docpull
description: Pull public web sources into Codex as local, searchable Markdown through docpull's MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch public web sources into local, searchable Markdown.
interface.longDescription: docpull gives Codex a local MCP server for fetching public static and server-rendered web sources, indexing them as Markdown, searching cached pages, and reading cited passages without API keys or browser automation.
capabilities: Fetch public HTTPS pages as Markdown
interface.defaultPrompt: Use docpull when I ask about a specific library, framework, SDK, API, or public docs URL. Prefer cached docs first, fetch only the requested source, and cite source paths when answering.
